products.name: Tuga H6
products.description: A rugged smartphone built for tradespeople who need a tough device in their pocket. IP68 waterproof, drop tested, with all-day battery life and 5G connectivity.
products.longDescription: The Tuga H6 is built for the tradesperson who needs their tech to survive the job. With IP68 and IP69K waterproofing, MIL-STD-810H drop protection, and a 10600mAh battery that lasts well beyond a full shift, this is the phone that keeps up with you. The 64MP night vision camera is perfect for documenting dark spaces, crawl areas, and under-floor inspections. 5G connectivity means you are never waiting on downloads or uploads, even on remote sites.
products.positioning: The pocket option. For tradespeople who need a tough device they can carry in a pocket or holster. Proof of delivery, quick photos, barcode scanning, comms.

products.name: Tuga T8
products.tagline: The all-rounder. Built for every site.
products.description: 8 inch rugged Android tablet with IP67 protection, 4G LTE, and a battery that lasts a full shift. The most popular size for tradespeople who want portability without sacrificing usability.
products.longDescription: The Tuga T8 hits the sweet spot between portability and screen space. At 8 inches, it fits in a van door pocket or a hand strap, but gives you enough room for forms, maps, and site documents. IP67 waterproof and MIL-STD-810G drop tested, with a sunlight readable 800 nit display and a 10000mAh battery. Vehicle mountable with 4G LTE built in, so it works as a dashboard unit or a handheld site tablet.
products.positioning: The all-rounder. The sweet spot between portability and screen space. One-handed use, fits in a van door pocket, enough screen for forms, maps, and basic drawings.

products.name: Tuga T10
products.description: The 10.1 inch rugged Android tablet for when you need serious screen space. View blueprints, run BIM software, manage logistics, all from a device that survives the job.
products.longDescription: When you need real screen estate, the Tuga T10 delivers. At 10.1 inches with a bright display and IP68/IP69K waterproofing, this is the tablet for blueprints, BIM viewers, full spreadsheets, and PDF plans. The 10800mAh battery runs a full shift and then some. Dual SIM 4G keeps you connected, and Android 14 means you have access to every app you need. Stays on the dashboard or in a mount, ready for whatever the day throws at it.
products.positioning: The site tablet. For when you need real screen estate. Blueprints, BIM viewers, full spreadsheets, PDF plans.

products.name: Tuga WH6
products.description: A 6.5 inch rugged Windows handheld for professionals who need desktop software on the move. Run legacy apps, access network drives, and manage field data from a device that fits in a holster.
products.longDescription: The Tuga WH6 puts full Windows 11 Pro in your pocket. Intel N100 processor, 16GB RAM, and 512GB SSD means you can run legacy Windows software, access network drives, and manage field data without compromise. IP67 waterproof and MIL-STD-810H tested, with a 10000mAh battery and 4G LTE. Optional barcode scanner variant available for warehouse and logistics use. Charging dock sold separately for desk use.
products.positioning: The pocket option. Windows in your pocket for professionals who need desktop software on the move.

products.name: Tuga W8
products.description: 8 inch rugged Windows 11 tablet with Intel processor, full USB ports, and HDMI output. For professionals who need Windows software in the field without compromising on durability.
products.longDescription: The Tuga W8 puts full Windows 11 Pro in a rugged 8 inch form factor. Intel Celeron N5100, 8GB RAM, and 128GB SSD run your Windows software without compromise. Full port selection including USB-C, USB-A, and HDMI means you can connect to any peripheral or display. IP67 waterproof with a 10000mAh battery, NFC, and a pogo pin dock connector for desk mounting. Optional barcode scanner variant available.
products.positioning: Desktop power in a site-proof build. The 8 inch Windows tablet for professionals who need real software in the field.

products.name: Tuga W10
products.description: 10.1 inch rugged Windows 11 tablet with Intel processor, full port selection including RJ45 Ethernet, and HDMI. For engineers, surveyors, and field professionals who need full desktop capability.
products.longDescription: The Tuga W10 is the full desktop experience in a rugged package. 10.1 inch FHD display, Intel Celeron N5100, 8GB RAM, and 128GB SSD run Windows 11 Pro without compromise. The full port selection includes USB-C, USB-A, HDMI, and RJ45 Ethernet for direct network connections. IP67 waterproof with a 5000mAh battery, fingerprint sensor, and pogo pin dock connector. Optional 2D barcode scanner and UHF reader variants available for warehouse and logistics applications.
products.positioning: The full desktop experience. Anywhere. For when you need real screen estate, full ports, and full Windows.
